Appearance:
Donald McBride, Esq., for Defendant/Cross-complainant and moving party: Webcor Construction, In.c

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant/Cross- complainant Webcor construction, Inc.'s motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to serve verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. The Court has read and considered the declaration of counsel for plaintiff. Commissioner: Bruce Chan.
